decision_commentary: All five required fields present (source_channel='professional_contact', category='project_inquiry', received_at='2026-03-17T09:00:00-07:00', summary, status='new'). Completeness scores 3 because the rubric specifies score 5 requires raw message stored verbatim — the lead-record.json contains a structured summary rather than the raw verbatim client message ('Buenas tardes, me recomendaron...'), which is only present in lead-summary.json. Accuracy is 5: source_channel correctly identifies professional_contact; category correctly classified as project_inquiry. Clarity is 5: summary immediately scannable — project type (residential_in_development), location (San José del Cabo), client name (Patricia Reyes), budget signal, HOA details all visible. State sync scores 3: status='new' is correct but this is a simulated run — no live Asana verification. Timing scores 5: received_at and creation are in-session. Decision readiness 5: all required fields present, quality signal (budget, program, HOA context) is clear for Marcela.
celia_routing_notes: No Celia routing at Segment A lead-record creation — Celia fires at DG-01 after Marcela reviews the lead-summary.
